title: Speak things into existence — empty-body manifestation note (July 2023)
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from July 28, 2023 with title "Speak things into existencen" (note the typo'd trailing "n") and a completely empty body.
  • Title-only manifestation/affirmation note — Yahir captured the intent to write something about speaking outcomes into existence and never returned.
  • Title alone is a clean manifesto style note seed: it sits in the same ideological neighborhood as "never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want", walk with gods eyes, max effort commit, and soul as beacon — the energetic-output / will-to-manifest cluster.
  • Captured 5 days before the Jo breakup note — the affirmation may have been pre-emptive, willing a future outcome that didn't land.
  • Pure empty-body subtype: the title IS the entire note.

Why an empty note is still load-bearing

  • The title is the data. Yahir's titling habit reveals what he was about to think — and these unfinished titles, aggregated, would form their own corpus of intent-without-execution.
  • "Speak things into existence" is one of the most-quoted manifestation phrases in 2020s self-help — Yahir absorbed and re-said it, even if briefly.
  • Belongs to a recurring family in the vault: short manifesto-fragments that prefigure the longer ones.

Connections

  • — empty-body subtype (title-only)
  • — genre
  • walk with gods eyes · soul as beacon · max effort commit — same ideological neighborhood
  • 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want — fuller version of this energy 14 months later
  • 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup — what came 5 days later
